function: () => { const panel = document.getElementById('draw-strength-panel'); panel.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { const r2 = panel.getBoundingClientRect(); r({ panelY: r2.top, panelBottom: r2.bottom, classes: panel.className, readout: document.getElementById('draw-strength-readout').textContent, scrollY: window.scrollY }); }, 800)); }
